title: Scholarly Reference
description: A scholarly or source reference associated with an atom or CDG sub-graph.

ref_id.description: Short author-year slug used as a stable key across manifests (e.g. hamilton1986).

url.description: Canonical URL when no DOI is available, or supplementary link.

bibtex_key.description: Key used in the generated .bib file. Defaults to ref_id if omitted.

authors.description: Author names in 'First Last' or 'Last, First' format.

bibtex_raw.description: Complete BibTeX entry for lossless round-tripping.

match_metadata.description: How this reference was matched to the atom. Null/absent for manually curated entries.

similarity_score.description: 0-1 score from the similarity engine. Null for manual attributions.

matched_nodes.description: CDG node_ids that triggered the match.
